title: Exobiology Earnings
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Value), 0) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(Bonus), 0) AS bonus FROM SellOrganicData WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} Cr earned from selling organic data during the report period, including {bonus} Cr in first-discovery bonuses. Exobiology is one of the highest-value per-sample activities in the galaxy — and the first-discovery bonus makes being early to a species genuinely lucrative.
details.help: SellOrganicData Value is the base payment; Bonus is the extra first-discovery credit. total drives the title as the total payout.

tagLines: Organic data sale revenue compiled. Universal Cartographics has processed the biological submissions.
Every sample on this receipt was growing on a planet before you found it. Now it's credits.
First discovery bonuses are how the galaxy rewards the curious. You collected a few of those.
